quotes.text: The competent programmer is fully aware of the strictly limited size of his own skull; therefore he approaches the programming task in full humility.
quotes.author: Edsger W. Dijkstra
quotes.source: The Humble Programmer, 1972 Turing Award Lecture

quotes.text: The code you wrote 6 months ago might as well have been written by someone else. And that someone was an idiot.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: The best product teams listen more than they talk. Your users know more about their problems than you do.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The most dangerous thing in the world is a programmer who thinks they understand security.
quotes.author: based
